title: WOW Burger Digital Menu
purpose: Interactive digital food ordering UI system.
learned: Implementing fluid client-side states, dynamic cart calculations, and responsive multi-touch layouts.
impact: Restructured tableside interactions, eliminating ordering friction and boosting item-discovery speed.

title: Automated Quiz Wizard
purpose: Logic-based quiz generation and automation system.
learned: Designing a strict state-machine to produce dynamic questionnaires and branch answers cleanly.
impact: Streamlined visual assessments, reducing time spent setting up logic trees from hours to seconds.

title: Siltawi Website
learned: Crafting clean semantics, aligning grid elements, and setting up solid search engine crawlers optimization.
impact: Created an expansive, modern, and accessible interface establishing a robust online focal point.

title: Bookmark System
purpose: Personal information and resource management tool.
learned: Creating performant localized storage schemas and configuring ultra-low latency filtering.
impact: Consolidated loose resource notes and research bookmarks into a clean, searchable, and highly actionable digital memory vault.
